metadata.title:
JOHN MITCHELL TAKES STAND


DENIES CONNECTION OF THE


MINERS, UNION WITH RIOTERS

pages.raw_text:
PHILADELPHIA. Jan a--Anthra.
cite. commission today announced
that hereafter long sessions would be
held to expedite the investigation.


Examination OF non union men and
their families continued, bringing out
fresh tales OF abuse by the strikers.


One woman testified how, with her
husband. she was walking a street in
Silver Creek when her husband was
assaulted by strikers aud knocked
down and beaten. When she ATTEMPT
cd to protect him she was also
abused.


Another woman told how her house
was stoned. She recognized as the
leader of the assailants her brother
in-law. who was president of.the To-
cal union of mine workers. She went
out with gun and made the crowd
dispense. telling her relative what she
fought of him. The woman proved
one Of the strtVgest witnesses of the
